zh.Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut, Britis: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特
zh.Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut, United: 美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特
zh.Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony,: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特
zh.lifeSummary: Lieut. William Seward於大約1627年出生在英國。他於1651年4月2日與Grace Norton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1689年3月2日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lieut. William Seward于大约1627年出生在英国。他于1651年4月2日与Grace Norton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1689年3月2日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Seward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Seward (Old English Sǣweard, from sǣ ‘sea’ + weard ‘guard’).
English: from the Middle English personal name Siward, Seward (Old English Sigeweard, from sige ‘victory’ + weard ‘guard’, or the equivalent Old Norse Sigwarth).
Irish (Cork): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Suaird, Ó Suairt, usually Anglicized as Sword .

variants.name: Sewer
meanings: African American: probably an altered form of English   Seward  .
Swiss German: habitational name for someone from either of two places called Seewen (Schwyz and Solothurn).
Germanized or Americanized form of Slovenian and Croatian   Sever  .

variants.name: Sword
meanings: English: probably a shortened form of   Seward  .
English: nickname from Middle English sword(e), swerd(e) ‘sword’, perhaps used for a swordsman or armourer.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Suaird, Ó Suairt ‘descendant of Suart’, a personal name derived from Old Norse Sigvarthr ‘victory keeper’, a cognate of Old English Sigeweard; compare Seward 2.

variants.name: Sheward
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Seward  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: On April 24, 1638, a company of five-hundred English Puritans led by the Reverend John Davenport and Theophilus Eaton, a wealthy London merchant, sailed into the harbor.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: Lieut. William Seward was born about 1627, in England. He married Grace Norton on 2 April 1651, in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 2 March 1689, in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 63.

ja.lifeSummary: Lieut. William Sewardは約1627年にイギリスで生まれた。1651年4月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベングイルフォードでGrace Nortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1689年3月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベングイルフォードで63歳で死去した。

ko.Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 길퍼드

ko.lifeSummary: Lieut. William Seward(은)는 대략 1627년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 1651년 4월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 길퍼드에서 Grace Norton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1689년 3월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 길퍼드에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Lieut. William Seward родился около 1627 г. в местности Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Grace Norton 2 апреля 1651 г. в местности гуилфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 2 марта 1689 г. в местности гуилфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 63 лет.
